articles.title: Trump-Backed WLFI and Sui Announce Strategic Reserve Deal and Collaboration
articles.description: TL;DR World Liberty Financial (WLFI), backed by Donald Trump, announced a collaboration with the Sui Foundation to develop blockchain products and applications. WLFI will integrate Sui assets into its “Macro Strategy,” a strategic token reserve aimed at strengthening projects within the DeFi ecosystem. This partnership could revolutionize asset management and improve transparency in...
